delete.description: Admin only. Cancels one of the account's keys.

get.summary: Get the account's per-customer fairness configuration
get.description: Admin only. Returns whether fairness/overage are enabled, the default per-key weight, and the shared-burst percentage for the account's active plan.

patch.summary: Update the account's per-customer fairness configuration
patch.description: Admin only. Only the fields you supply are changed. Fairness is a paid-plan feature. See NESTING_MINUTES_FAIRNESS_DESIGN.md.

get.description: Admin only (an Admin API key or the account owner). Returns every key on the account with its type and fairness weight.

post.description: Admin only. Programmatically issue a key to one of your customers. Defaults to a Usage key; set KeyType=Admin to mint another admin key. Subject to the plan's active-key cap.

get.summary: Check the expiry date of your ApiKey
get.description:
This endpoint requires calling with your Api Key.
If your Api key has an expiry it will return when it expires.
If your Api key does not expire, it will return 31/12/9999 as the expiry date.

get.summary: Request a response for a nesting Result based on ResponseType passed
get.description:
This endpoint requires calling with your ApiKey

Id
String
This Id is NestIdentifier in the JSON pushed to your webhook for nesting. It is also returned from the /nesting endpoint

ResultId
String
This Id is ResultIdentity in the JSON pushed to your webhook for nesting.

ResponseType
Enum / Int
This alters the kind of result that is pushed to your provided webhook
0 or result - Posts part placement details of result to webhook
1 or render - Posts base64 encode render (SVG or PNG) of the result to webhook
2 or dxf - Posts base64 encoded dxf file of the results to webhook
3 or reportsource - Posts information designed for report generation, statistics and base64 renderings to webhook
4 or remnantexport -Posts base64 encoded zip file containing the dxf representation of remnants generated by the nesting to webhook

WebHookUri
String
Web hook uri to POST the result to

200.description: Nesting request accepted. Returns a RequestId for tracking.

400.description: Invalid request — check file encoding or missing required fields.

401.description: API key is missing or invalid.

get.summary: List allowed origins for an API key
get.description: List allowed origins for an API key

post.summary: Add an allowed browser Origin (CORS) to an API key. Provide a full absolute origin — scheme, host and (non-default) port — e.g. https://app.example.com. Origins are matched exactly, so register each distinct origin you call the API from. For local development, add your dev server's localhost origin (e.g. http://localhost:3000); the scheme and port must match exactly (http://localhost:3000 is different from https://localhost:3000 and from http://localhost:5173).
post.description: Add an allowed browser Origin (CORS) to an API key. Provide a full absolute origin — scheme, host and (non-default) port — e.g. https://app.example.com. Origins are matched exactly, so register each distinct origin you call the API from. For local development, add your dev server's localhost origin (e.g. http://localhost:3000); the scheme and port must match exactly (http://localhost:3000 is different from https://localhost:3000 and from http://localhost:5173).

delete.summary: Remove an allowed origin from an API key
delete.description: Remove an allowed origin from an API key

post.description: Admin only. Rotates one of the account's keys: cancels the old secret and issues a new one, carrying the key's reference, expiry, type, parallelism, fairness weight and allowed origins forward. The old key stops working immediately, so update integrations with the returned key.

patch.description: Admin only. Change a key's capability class — e.g. downgrade a key you handed to a customer from Admin to Usage.
Admin only. Sets the per-customer fairness weight for one of your keys; omit LineageWeight (null) to clear the override and fall back to the plan default.

get.description: Admin only (an Admin API key or the account owner). Returns how the account's nesting minutes are being shared across your API keys for the current period. Each row is one of your keys (i.e. one of your customers): the minutes it has consumed, its guaranteed fair-share floor, any overage it incurred, and a sizing signal to help you right-size weights. When fairness is not enabled on the plan the rows are informational only.

GetAccountBalanceLogs.title: GetAccountBalanceLogs
GetAccountBalanceLogs.description: Check that admin user is authorized

GetAccountNests.title: GetAccountNests
GetAccountNests.description: Paged nest reports for a customer account

GetErrorFile.title: GetErrorFile
GetErrorFile.description: Get related file for an error

SetTrialStatus.title: SetTrialStatus
SetTrialStatus.description: Set trial status of user in the system

AdminLoggedInCheck.title: AdminLoggedInCheck
AdminLoggedInCheck.description: Check that admin user is authorized

GetAllNestingRequestsForAllUsers.title: GetAllNestingRequestsForAllUsers
GetAllNestingRequestsForAllUsers.description: Fetch all nesting for all users

GetAvailablePurchaseOptions.title: GetAvailablePurchaseOptions
GetAvailablePurchaseOptions.description: Fetch all purchase options for any user or specific user

GetUserList.title: GetUserList
GetUserList.description: Get list of users in the system

GetUserProfile.title: GetUserProfile
GetUserProfile.description: Get profile of user in the system

ParametricGeometryNestingRequest.title: ParametricGeometryNestingRequest
ParametricGeometryNestingRequest.description: Submit a nesting request from parametric part definitions. Async: returns a RequestId; the result is delivered to your ResultsWebhookUri.

EncodedGeometryNestingRequest.title: EncodedGeometryNestingRequest
EncodedGeometryNestingRequest.description: Submit a nesting request from encoded geometry (from the importer or defined as SimpleGeometry). Async: returns a RequestId; the result is delivered to your ResultsWebhookUri.

MyNestingRequest.title: MyNestingRequest
MyNestingRequest.description: Submit a nesting request from a MyNesting XML document. Async: returns a RequestId; the result is delivered to your ResultsWebhookUri.

EncodedGeometryQuoteNestingRequest.title: EncodedGeometryQuoteNestingRequest
EncodedGeometryQuoteNestingRequest.description: Submit a quote nest from encoded geometry — a fast material-usage estimate for quoting. Export with /nesting/exportquotenest.

DxfQuoteNestingRequest.title: DxfQuoteNestingRequest
DxfQuoteNestingRequest.description: Submit a quote nest from base64-encoded DXF parts — a fast material-usage estimate for quoting, not full production output. Export with /nesting/exportquotenest.

NestingRequest1D.title: NestingRequest1D
NestingRequest1D.description: Submit a 1D (linear) nesting request for bar, tube, or profile stock. Returns the optimised cutting plan synchronously in the response.

ValidateApiKey.title: ValidateApiKey
ValidateApiKey.description: Validates the caller's API key is active and returns basic identity info

DxfNestingRequest.title: DxfNestingRequest
DxfNestingRequest.description: Submit a nesting request from base64-encoded DXF files. Returns a RequestId immediately; the completed layout is delivered asynchronously to your ResultsWebhookUri (or streamed over SignalR when AutomaticallyStartNesting is false).

GetKeyAllowedOrigins.title: GetKeyAllowedOrigins
GetKeyAllowedOrigins.description: List allowed origins for an API key

AddKeyAllowedOrigin.title: AddKeyAllowedOrigin
AddKeyAllowedOrigin.description: Add an allowed browser Origin (CORS) to an API key. Provide a full absolute origin — scheme, host and (non-default) port — e.g. https://app.example.com. Origins are matched exactly, so register each distinct origin you call the API from. For local development, add your dev server's localhost origin (e.g. http://localhost:3000); the scheme and port must match exactly (http://localhost:3000 is different from https://localhost:3000 and from http://localhost:5173).

RemoveKeyAllowedOrigin.title: RemoveKeyAllowedOrigin
RemoveKeyAllowedOrigin.description: Remove an allowed origin from an API key

FetchKeys.title: FetchKeys
FetchKeys.description: Get a list of active API keys

Alive.title: Alive
Alive.description: Endpoint to check if the api is alive

GetAssignmentTypes.title: GetAssignmentTypes
GetAssignmentTypes.description: Get all assignable layer selection -  currently Cut/Ignore/Attach/Not Assigned

CreateImportSession.title: CreateImportSession
CreateImportSession.description: Start a new importer session. Optional header X-End-User-Id: an end-user identifier for accounts where multiple end users share one API key — when supplied, importer layer assignments are stored and reloaded per end user; when omitted, they are indexed by API key/account only.

CancelSessionSettings.title: CancelSessionSettings
CancelSessionSettings.description: Cancel the session and remove all data

UpdateModelSettings.title: UpdateModelSettings
UpdateModelSettings.description: Update a files Cut/Ignore/Attach/Not Assigned settings

RetrieveModelIdentity.title: RetrieveModelIdentity
RetrieveModelIdentity.description: Get layers generated by file processing -  Allows setting of Layer options Cut/Ignore/Attach/Not Assigned

RetrieveResultIdentity.title: RetrieveResultIdentity
RetrieveResultIdentity.description: Fetch parts list and part renders

CancelSessionRequest.title: CancelSessionRequest
CancelSessionRequest.description: Cancel the import session and remove all data

CompleteSessionRequest.title: CompleteSessionRequest
CompleteSessionRequest.description: Submit all changes and receive part geometry for submission
